summary: Completed comprehensive testing of merchant API integration for P2P shop functionality. Backend APIs working perfectly (13/13 tests passed). Frontend integration mostly working with minor UI interaction issues preventing full payment flow completion.

ui_bugs.issue: 'Перейти к оплате' button remains disabled after checking terms checkbox
ui_bugs.impact: Prevents completion of payment flow from operator selection to payment details

ui_bugs.issue: Transaction history button (clock icon) not found in header
ui_bugs.impact: Users cannot access transaction history feature

passed_tests: Backend API health check and connectivity (13/13 tests passed, 100% success rate)
Operator selection screen loading with '3 операторов'
3 test operators (user1, user2, user3) displayed correctly
Payment method filter with card/SBP options working
Operator cards clickable and showing correct pricing
Operator dialog opens with payment details (1,000 RUB)
Invoice API payment methods endpoint working
Public operators API returning expected 3 operators with card/SBP methods
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix UI interaction issue: 'Перейти к оплате' button not enabling after terms acceptance. Add transaction history button to shop header. Core merchant API integration working correctly.
